# Baseline itinerary: 2 days in Freiburg im Breisgau

## Goal and constraints understood
- **Origin**: Arriving by train (main station: Freiburg Hauptbahnhof)
- **Dates**: 2026-06-06 to 2026-06-07
- **Budget**: €320 EUR for 1 traveler
- **Interests**: Old town, Black Forest views, local food
- **Pace**: Relaxed
- **Transport**: Walk and public transit only

## Search summary
- Freiburg Old Town attractions: Münster Cathedral, Münsterplatz, Schwabentor Gate, Bächle watercourses ([visit.freiburg.de](https://visit.freiburg.de/en/discover/sightseeing/old-town))
- Schlossbergbahn funicular offers panoramic Black Forest views ([wanderlog.com](https://wanderlog.com/place/details/1577059/schlossbergbahn))
- Local Baden cuisine: Black Forest cake, regional sausages, Münsterplatz market ([tasteatlas.com](https://www.tasteatlas.com/freiburg), [landlopers.com](https://landlopers.com/2015/08/02/freiburg))
- Public transport: Deutschlandticket €63/month from 2026; single tickets available ([iamexpat.de](https://www.iamexpat.de/expat-info/germany-news/price-public-transport-increase-5-german-states-2026))

## Day 1

| Time | Type | Plan | Location | Cost | Evidence/Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| 09:00-10:00 | transport | Arrive at Freiburg Hauptbahnhof | Freiburg Hauptbahnhof | €0 | Arriving by train; no additional transport cost |
| 10:00-10:30 | walk | Walk to hotel/check-in | City center (Altstadt) | €0 | Most hotels in pedestrian-friendly old town |
| 10:30-11:30 | sightseeing | Explore Münsterplatz & Freiburg Cathedral | Münsterplatz | €0 | Historic square and Gothic cathedral; free entry ([viator.com](https://www.viator.com/Freiburg/d34163)) |
| 11:30-12:30 | sightseeing | Walk through old town: Bächle watercourses, historic merchants' hall | Altstadt | €0 | Famous medieval water channels criss-cross streets ([visit.freiburg.de](https://visit.freiburg.de/en/discover/sightseeing/old-town)) |
| 12:30-13:30 | lunch | Local Baden lunch at Münsterplatz market | Münsterplatz | €15 | Estimate: regional specialties, sausages, produce |
| 13:30-14:30 | sightseeing | Visit Schwabentor Gate | Schwabentor | €0 | Medieval gate; iconic old town landmark |
| 14:30-15:30 | walk | Stroll through historic Konviktstraße | Konviktstraße | €0 | Popular creative alleyway with pop-up shops ([visit.freiburg.de](https://visit.freiburg.de/en/discover/sightseeing/old-town)) |
| 15:30-17:00 | relax | Coffee & Black Forest cake break | Altstadt café | €8 | Estimate: coffee + slice ~€8 |
| 17:00-19:00 | free time | Leisure time in old town | Altstadt | €0 | Optional: browse shops, enjoy atmosphere |
| 19:00-20:30 | dinner | Traditional Baden dinner | Altstadt restaurant | €25 | Estimate: regional dinner |

## Day 2

| Time | Type | Plan | Location | Cost | Evidence/Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| 09:00-10:00 | breakfast | Breakfast at hotel or local café | Altstadt | €10 | Estimate |
| 10:00-11:00 | transport | Take Schlossbergbahn funicular up Schlossberg | Stadtgarten/Schlossberg | €6 | Estimate: one-way or round trip; panoramic views ([booked.ai](https://booked.ai/attractions/take-a-ride-on-the-schlossberg-funicular-for-scenic-views)) |
| 11:00-12:30 | sightseeing | Enjoy Black Forest views from Schlossberg summit | Schlossberg | €0 | Panoramic vistas of Freiburg, Rhine River, Black Forest ([wanderlog.com](https://wanderlog.com/place/details/1577059/schlossbergbahn)) |
| 12:30-13:30 | lunch | Lunch at Schlossberg or return to Altstadt | Schlossberg/Altstadt | €15 | Estimate |
| 13:30-15:00 | sightseeing | Visit Augustinermuseum or Haus zum schönen Eck | Altstadt | €8 | Estimate: museum entry if open; historic merchant houses ([getyourguide.com](https://www.getyourguide.com/freiburg-l22/old-town-tours-tc2109/)) |
| 15:00-16:30 | walk | Walk to Martinstor Gate | Martinstor | €0 | Medieval gate; second historic city gate |
| 16:30-18:00 | relax | Final exploration: grab local wine or regional produce | Altstadt | €12 | Estimate: wine or snacks |
| 18:00-19:00 | transport | Walk to Freiburg Hauptbahnhof for departure | Hauptbahnhof | €0 | Walk back to station |

## Budget summary

| Category | Estimated Cost (EUR) |
|---|---:|
| Accommodation (1 night) | €100 |
| Food & drinks | €85 |
| Local transport (funicular) | €6 |
| Attractions/museums | €8 |
| Contingency/souvenirs | €30 |
| **Total estimated** | **€229** |

**Remaining budget**: ~€91 under €320 limit

## Unscheduled or uncertain items
- Hotel booking: Prices require live confirmation; €100 is an estimate for budget hotel in Altstadt
- Freiburg City Card: Could provide free public transport and museum discounts but not calculated into this baseline
- Specific restaurant reservations: Not made; recommendations based on search findings

## Assumptions and gaps
- Arrival time is estimated at 09:00; actual train schedule not verified
- Hotel prices are estimates based on typical budget accommodation in Freiburg's old town
- Opening hours for Augustinermuseum and other attractions should be verified upon arrival
- Single ticket prices for VAG public transport not precisely found; funicular cost is estimate
- Weather conditions may affect Schlossberg visit; alternative: explore more of old town
- No advance reservations made; this is a baseline framework for comparison
